design_style: Modern Conversational UI / Flat Material Pop / Vibrant Minimalist

typography.header_font_style: Bold Modern Sans-Serif / Heavy Hei-Ti (Chinese Display)
typography.body_font_style: Regular Clean Sans-Serif / System UI Font
typography.layout_logic: Asymmetrical staggered cluster (top) paired with symmetrical center-axis (bottom)
text_effects: Flush-left optical alignment within irregular rounded containers
High-contrast inverse (white) text on vibrant solid background fills
Generous line height for legibility inside contained blocks

geometry: Sharp directional pointer tails contrasting with ultra-soft curves
textures: Solid un-graded color blocking without gradients
motifs: Downward triple chevron scroll indicator (UI affordance)

compositional_rules.spacing: Dense, overlapping visual weight in the top two-thirds; expansive neutral negative space isolating the bottom elements
compositional_rules.depth: 2.5D layered Z-axis utilizing distinct drop shadows to separate physical layers of flat color shapes
compositional_rules.hierarchy: Visual flow cascades top-to-bottom through size and color alternation, naturally guiding the eye to the final dark-text call-to-action
compositional_rules.alignment: Organic, staggered horizontal offsets for hero graphics, resolving into a strict centered vertical axis for the footer
